sections.paragraph:
Original: מקצעה מקצע מקצוע

Transliteration: maqtsôa‛ maqtsôa‛ maqtsô‛âh

Phonetic: mak-tso'-ah

BDB Definition:

  1. place of corner structure, corner buttress, inner corner-buttress
    1. corner post, buttress-place, buttress

Origin: from H7106 in the denominative sense of bending

TWOT entry: 2057a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
